sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current button states
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
    if min_row >= 42 and min_row <= 46 and n['pixels'] <= 10:
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} at ({min_row},{min_col})-({min_row},{max_col})")

# Also check if anything on checkerboard changed
print("\nCheckerboard objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 5 and n['pixels'] < 50:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
        if 10 <= min_row <= 40:
            min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
            max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} at ({min_row},{min_col})-({max_row},{max_col})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
